event_signals.description: US-Israel war on Iran enters third week with 6,000+ targets struck and 1,348 civilians killed
Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed; Iran's new supreme leader vows to maintain blockade
Oil above $100/bbl as IEA approves historic 400M barrel reserve release
Israel expands Lebanon war — 680+ killed, 800,000 displaced as IDF pushes past Litani River
France announces unprecedented naval deployment — 10 warships to reopen Strait of Hormuz
USTR launches Section 301 investigations into 16 economies for manufacturing excess capacity
USTR initiates Section 301 forced labor investigations against 60 trading partners
North Korea fires 10 ballistic missiles in response to US-South Korea Freedom Shield exercises
Belgium paralyzed by 24-hour general strike — all flights cancelled, €25M daily economic loss
US sanctions Rwanda Defence Force and senior officials over M23 support in DRC
Vietnam holds general election — 73.5 million voters elect 500 National Assembly members
Denmark snap election called for March 24 as Frederiksen capitalizes on Greenland standoff with Trump
Trump launches 'Shield of Americas' military alliance with 15 Latin American nations; threatens Cuba
US formally recognizes Delcy Rodriguez as Venezuela's head of state
Sudan RSF drone campaign kills 200+ civilians since March 4; school strike kills 17 girls
US CPI for February steady at 2.4% — pre-Iran-war data masks coming energy shock
Russia-Ukraine peace talks stall at '90% complete' — frontline fighting continues
US-South Korea Freedom Shield exercise begins with 18,000 personnel amid Iran war
Rep. Kevin Kiley leaves Republican Party for independent — GOP House majority narrows to 217-214
Zelenskiy speaks with Saudi Crown Prince as diplomatic efforts continue
Russia emerges as early economic winner from Iran war amid oil price surge
OFAC issues General License for Venezuelan-origin gold transactions
DRC-M23 conflict continues — M23 hands over 5,000 FARDC prisoners as FARDC drone-strikes Goma
Pro-Palestine Al-Quds Day rally planned for central London on March 15
Stranded Iranian sailors create diplomatic dilemma for Sri Lanka and India
Russia hits Ukraine with large-scale drone and missile barrage; at least 10 killed in Kharkiv
War powers vote fails in US Senate; Trump authorized to continue Iran strikes
Qatar F-15QA fighters intercept Iranian bombers targeting US base in Gulf
US gas prices surge to $3.63/gal — 22-month high driven by Iran war
OFAC removes UAE freight company Globe Trekkers from SDN List
Russian propaganda targets Hungary with fake news about Ukrainian cash-in-transit guards
China's top graduates shift to manufacturing sector from tech and finance
Vena Group signs $674M MoU for green energy projects in South Korea
BlackRock freezes billionaire cash-outs from $26B fund amid market turmoil
US Senate war powers vote highlights congressional fractures over Iran war authorization
Israel strikes Hezbollah financial institutions in Lebanon
Lebanese PM demands Hezbollah disarm and limit to political activities
Marjorie Taylor Greene's vacated Georgia congressional seat heads to runoff
Iran's supreme leader succession: Mojtaba Khamenei assumes power after father's killing
Iran-made drones strike Cyprus — EU member drawn into Middle East conflict
Trump says US military 'totally obliterated' targets on Iran's Kharg Island oil terminal
US inflation gauges diverged before Iran war — energy shock to dominate future readings

Dual chokepoint crisis: Suez Canal transit suspended by Maersk and CMA CGM simultaneously with Hormuz closure. All vessels rerouting via Cape of Good Hope. Far East-to-Europe and Far East-to-Middle East routes face 10-15 additional transit days. Cont

Panama Canal ports Balboa and Cristobal resumed normal operations this week despite lingering congestion from previous closure period. Panama Canal functioning normally amid global shipping disruption from Hormuz/Suez rerouting, potentially seeing in
